annotation_target.structure: Contrasting episode antecedent — more active texture, slight agitation
teaching_goals: feel the contrast — this episode is more active than the main theme
the LH texture requires more precision here
style_tips: mp to mf — more energy than the main theme
the contrast is intentional — don't smooth it out

teaching_notes.note: The contrasting episode — more active, slightly urgent. A different character entirely.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 25–28 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile), view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 25–28 of Pathetique mvt 2 — a contrasting episode enters here. Describe it.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 25–28.
Measures 25–28 bring a contrasting episode — the character shifts from the cantabile main theme to a more active, slightly agitated passage. The LH texture becomes busier. Let me loop mm. 25–28.
Pathetique mvt 2 mm. 25–28: contrasting episode, more active texture, slight agitation.
